PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden, for petitioner Noreen Curtain.

Ms. McFadden stated that she had nothing to add to the papers before the Court on the petition. The Court granted the petition for probate of will (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)
